summary: BGMI tournament platform with user registration flow: Name/Phone/BGMI ID first, then Internet Identity login. Admin panel, user panel, and homepage are functional. Coin wallet and payment proof system are pending features.
architectural_notes: Registration flow: user fills Name, Phone Number, BGMI ID first, then authenticates via Internet Identity
Platform uses Internet Identity for authentication (ICP blockchain)
known_issues: Registration form shows Name/Phone/BGMI ID fields but Internet Identity option not appearing after form submission

existing_features.title: Fix the multi-step registration flow on RegisterPage so that: Step 1 collects Name, Phone Number, and BGMI Player ID; after the user submits Step 1, Step 2 renders the Internet Identity login/authentication button so the user can complete registration via Internet Identity. The Internet Identity step must be clearly visible and functional after Step 1 form submission.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix registration flow: show Name/Phone/BGMI ID form first, then Internet Identity login step
